title: Verify decompose flow for multi-area task 2007-retest
description: Verify that the decompose pipeline correctly handles a complex multi-area task. The notification system implementation already exists with model, service, routes, utils, and tests. The task is to validate that the decompose flow (taskify → plan → build → verify → review → ship) produces correct sub-tasks, worktrees, and PR body with 'Decomposed Implementation' section.
existing_patterns: src/services/notifications.ts - Service layer pattern using Payload SDK with constructor injection
src/models/notification.ts - Domain model with TypeScript types and interfaces
src/routes/notifications.ts - API route handler using withAuth HOC and NextRequest/Response
src/utils/notificationHelpers.ts - Utility functions with JSDoc examples
src/services/notifications.test.ts - Vitest unit tests with mockPayload pattern
